# Rabbia Ashraf & Associates

A professional, global, multidisciplinary child development centre providing parent guidance, child development support, and specialist consultation.

## Purpose
Our platform allows parents to learn from evidence-informed resources, compare available specialists by region/expertise/language/price, and book consultations.

## Services & Scope
We provide developmental guidance, ASD/ADHD support planning, behavior strategy discussion, executive-function routines, and school communication preparation internationally. Regulated clinical therapy, diagnosis, and assessment are provided *only* where legally and ethically permitted by the provider's credentials and the client's location.

## Important Pages
- Directory: /choose-a-provider
- Services: /services

## Contact & Booking

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/rabbiapsychologist
- Emergency Disclaimer: This platform does not provide emergency care. Contact local emergency services for urgent concerns.
